response:
I want 10 weaknesses of [Company Name] from 2023 and I want the 10 points to be similar to this:

1. [Company Name]'s earnings fell [Percentage]% from [Year] to [Year].
2. [Company Name]'s EPS down $[Amount] in [Year] from the previous year.
3. [Company Name] share prices down [Percentage]% from [Year] to [Year].
4. Entirely dependent on demand for a single [Product/Service] source, [Specific Product].
5. Total liabilities increased from $[Amount] to $[Amount] from [Year] to [Year].
6. [Company Name] produced [Percentage]% fewer [Units] of [Product] in the first half of [Year] as a result of weak demand from [Industry Sector] due to [Specific Event].
7. [Competitor Name] [Product Category] division sales up [Percentage]% from [Year] to [Year]; [Company Name] has no [Product Category] offerings.
8. [Competitor Name] achieved its goal to provide [Specific Standard] in [Percentage]% of its [Facility Type] by [Date]. [Company Name]'s [Product] have no [Specific Standard].
9. Sales to [Company Name]'s top ten customers represented approximately [Percentage]% of their net sales during fiscal year [Year].
10. [Company Name] faces multiple pending lawsuits in [Year], from [Charge Type] charges to [Regulation Type] violations.
